summary: Command Center layout rework testing complete. All UI components verified working correctly. Layout: SOC panel (full width, 1183px) with chat bubble at bottom-right, then below SOC: Positions panel (LEFT, col-span-7, x=76) + Scanner panel (RIGHT, col-span-5, x=1144). Both panels are OUTSIDE SentCom component (in NewDashboard.jsx). Old ScannerAlertsStrip horizontal card layout is gone.

minor.issue: Returns empty positions (expected - no IB Gateway connection)
Returns empty alerts (expected - no IB Gateway connection)

VERIFIED: ScannerAlertsPanel.jsx has data-testid='scanner-alerts-panel' and shows 'Scanner' header

VERIFIED: Chat overlay opens correctly with quick action pills (Performance, News, Brief, Rules, Summary)
